zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke於1230年出生在威爾士布洛可爾時，她的父親Warin de Munchensy36歲，母親Joan Marshal21歲。她於1247年8月13日與William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1307年9月20日在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫特享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特斯萬斯可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke于1230年出生在威尔士布洛可爾时，她的父亲Warin de Munchensy36岁，母亲Joan Marshal21岁。她于1247年8月13日与William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1307年9月20日在法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫特享年77岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特斯萬斯可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke was born in 1230, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, her father, Warin de Munchensy, was 36 and her mother, Joan Marshal, was 21. She married William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke on 13 August 1247, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 20 September 1307, in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 77, and was buried in Swanscombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke est née en 1230, à Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Warin de Munchensy, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Joan Marshal, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke le 13 août 1247, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 septembre 1307, à Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Swanscombe, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke 1230 in Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Warin de Munchensy 36 und ihre Mutter Joan Marshal 21. Sie hat am 13. August 1247 in England William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. September 1307 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich und wurde in Swanscombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke è nata il nel 1230 nel Pembrokeshire, Galles, sua padre, Warin de Munchensy, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Joan Marshal, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke il 13 agosto 1247, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 settembre 1307, nel Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Swanscombe, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembrokeが1230年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアで生まれた時，父Warin de Munchensyは36歳，母Joan Marshalは21歳であった。1247年8月13日にイギリスでWilliam de Valence 1st Earl of Pembrokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1307年9月20日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエントで77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントスワンスコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke(이)가 1230년 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Warin de Munchensy(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Marshal(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1247년 8월 13일 영국에서 William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1307년 9월 20일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처트에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 스완스코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke nasceu em 1230, em Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Warin de Munchensy, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Joan Marshal, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke em 13 de agosto de 1247, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1307, em Charente, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Swanscombe, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke родилась в 1230 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Warin de Munchensy было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Marshal, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke 13 августа 1247 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 20 сентября 1307 г. в местности чарент, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности сванскомб, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke nació en 1230, en Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, Warin de Munchensy, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Joan Marshal, tenía 21 años. Se casó con William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke el 13 de agosto de 1247, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1307, en Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Swanscombe, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
